phrases.cultural_note: The colonnades are connected by pedestrian promenades and underground passages.

likely_response.translation_en: The Park Colonnade, just go through the underpass.

responses.english: The Park Colonnade, just go through the underpass.

phrases.intent_en: Where are the oplatky wafer stalls?
phrases.cultural_note: Karlovy Vary oplatky are large, thin wafers, often eaten warm from the stall.

likely_response.local: Přímo u Tržní kolonády, vedle schodů.
likely_response.translation_en: Right by the Market Colonnade, next to the stairs.

responses.english: Right by the Market Colonnade, next to the stairs.
responses.local: Přímo u Tržní kolonády, vedle schodů.

phrases.cultural_note: Parking is limited in the spa center; hotel guests often use designated riverbank lots.

likely_response.local: U řeky za hotelem, parkovací automat je na konci.
likely_response.translation_en: By the river behind the hotel, the parking meter is at the end.

responses.english: By the river behind the hotel, the parking meter is at the end.
responses.local: U řeky za hotelem, parkovací automat je na konci.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I rent a mineral cup?
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu půjčit lázeňský pohárek?
phrases.cultural_note: Porcelain cups with a spout are traditional for drinking the thermal springs.

likely_response.local: U pramenáře v Mlýnské kolonádě, vlevo od vstupu.
likely_response.translation_en: From the spring attendant in the Mill Colonnade, left of the entrance.

responses.english: From the spring attendant in the Mill Colonnade, left of the entrance.
responses.local: U pramenáře v Mlýnské kolonádě, vlevo od vstupu.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I book spa treatments?
phrases.text_local: Kde si mohu zarezervovat lázeňské procedury?
phrases.cultural_note: Many spa hotels have their own booking desks, but the central balneoprovoz handles external bookings.

likely_response.local: Vpravo za Vřídelní kolonádou je balneoprovoz.
likely_response.translation_en: To the right behind the Hot Spring Colonnade is the balneology department.

responses.english: To the right behind the Hot Spring Colonnade is the balneology department.
responses.local: Vpravo za Vřídelní kolonádou je balneoprovoz.
